name: Weiss Schnee, practice match (English)
description: I really don't know what to do anymore. Creativity was never my thing. Anyway, this is a bot I'd already uploaded to my old account. I just don't want to recycle so many of my old bots, which are about 12, not counting the ones I've already recycled, like this one. I've only really been creating bots for a few months. I started creating bots on May 5, 2025, and it's worth noting that I used to dedicate myself exclusively to creating bots in Spanish. I just wanted to say that I'm always open to your requests, and I simply recycled this bot to revive the account.
creator: Bdjxure
